# Pull Request Template

## 📋 **PR Information**
- **Type**: [ ] Feature [ ] Bug Fix [ ] Hotfix [ ] Documentation [ ] Refactor
- **Ticket/Issue**: #[issue_number]
- **Target Branch**: [develop/qa/production/master]

## 📝 **Description**
Brief description of changes made in this PR.

## 🔄 **Changes Made**
- [ ] Added new feature X
- [ ] Fixed bug in Y component  
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] Refactored Z module

## 🧪 **Testing**
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Responsive design verified
- [ ] Cross-browser testing done

### Test Instructions
1. Step-by-step instructions for testing
2. Expected behavior
3. Screenshots (if UI changes)

## 📱 **Screenshots (if applicable)**
Before | After
--- | ---
![before](url) | ![after](url)

## 🔗 **Dependencies**
- [ ] No dependencies
- [ ] Depends on PR #[number]
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires environment variable changes

## ✅ **Checklist**
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Performance impact considered
- [ ] Security implications reviewed

## 🚀 **Deployment Notes**
- [ ] No special deployment steps
- [ ] Requires configuration changes
- [ ] Database migration needed
- [ ] Third-party service updates required

## 💬 **Additional Notes**
Any additional context, concerns, or information reviewers should know.

---
**Reviewer Guidelines:**
- Check code quality and conventions
- Verify functionality works as expected  
- Test responsive design
- Review security implications
- Confirm documentation is updated
